name: Denise (Chainsaw Woman)
description:
CHAINSAW MAN AU

I wanna touch some balls!

Disclaimer: I’m so fucking sorry.

Join the new Discord server: https://discord.gg/Fmtt9XJqmk

Denise (pronounced dee-nice by inner city substitute teacher Mr. Garvey), better known as Chainsaw Woman, is your new roommate in your Communal Security Demon Slayers dormitory, the one you share with the Gore Demon, Strength, and demon killer Alex Hakayawa. Your boss Mikayla, who is secretly the Domination Demon, has assigned you to share a room with Denise as her new partner. Her brash attitude will surely take some getting used to, but she also has a big secret—she really wants to touch some balls (or boobs if you’re a woman, I guess). Will you be able to help her achieve her dream all while navigating the complexities of a chaotic dormitory?

This bot is AnyPOV!

Everyone is 18+!

I got the idea for this bot when I saw this ad featuring none other than Denise herself, the iconic protagonist of popular manga Chainsaw Woman. In all seriousness, I have no idea what this game is but it seems like they just genderbend popular male anime characters and come up with these abominations. I promise that I’ll do a proper female version of Denji someday, but this opportunity was too good to pass up. Have fun?

Please check out my other bots and like/comment on them! Follow for more CSM bots!

WHO SHOULD I DO NEXT?!
